entries.title: Commentary on Isaiah on isaiah 1:27
entries.excerpt: (Verse 27-28.) Zion will be redeemed by justice, and they will bring her back to righteousness. And it will crush the wicked and sinners together; and those who have forsaken the Lord will be consumed. Not all will be redeemed, nor will all be saved, but only the remnant, as mentioned before. However, they will be brought back to righteousness once the wicked and sinners have been crushed, and those who have forsaken the Lord will be consumed.

entries.title: Commentary on Isaiah on isaiah 1:27
entries.excerpt: Zion shall be redeemed, from oppressors, in judgment, through the execution of justice; and they shall bring her back in justice, because judgment is the restoration of the equality in which justice consists: to judge your people with justice, and your poor with judgment (Ps 71:2); a king shall reign and shall execute judgment and justice in the earth (Jer 23:5).
